prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA888 Gen4 (CZPA)** 2.0L TSI with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger, upgraded **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.6:1 CR), **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm)** for 450whp on **E85 fuel** with a **Bosch Motorsport 0261S02086** standalone ECU (MED17.5.21)

Full **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ drivetrain upgrade** including a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily** twin-disc clutch, **034 Motorsport lightweight flywheel**, and **Quattro GmbH RS3-spec rear differential (40:60 torque split)** with **Wavetrac LSD** for improved off-road and track handling

Suspension overhaul with **KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way coilovers (adjustable rebound, compression, and preload)**, **034 Motorsport subframe collars**, **H&R anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**, and **Bilstein B16 dampers** paired with **SuperPro polyurethane bushings** for chassis rigidity
estetica: **Rieger Tuning RS6-inspired widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber fender flares (3.5" wider front, 4" wider rear)**, **APR Performance GT300 rear wing (carbon fiber)**, and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 21" forged wheels (9.5J ET35 front, 11J ET40 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (275/35/21 front, 305/30/21 rear)**

**Full custom airbrushed matte vinyl wrap** in **Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7Z)** with **3M Scotchprint Gloss Black accents** on the grille, mirror caps, and lower body cladding, paired with **VW Motorsport LED taillights (OEM+ style)** and **Depo Racing JDM-spec side markers**

**Interior rewrap** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara centers)**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 350mm diameter)**, **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, and **custom rear seat delete with a **034 Motorsport bolt-in half-cage (milled aluminum)** for weight reduction and rigidity
